title: sagina subulata subsp. merinoi
intro: Sagina subulata subsp. merinoi, also known as merino pearlwort, is a perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of merino pearlwort include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of merino pearlwort can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
